channel.title: GitHub Elm Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Elm in GitHub

item.title: azimuttapp/azimutt
item.description: Next-Gen ERD: Design, Explore, Document and Analyze your database

item.title: res-mon/ResMon
item.description: Designed to streamline project workflows for freelancers and small businesses, ResMon combines time tracking with project management features in a user-friendly platform. Gain insights into productivity and manage projects with ease, all in one place.
